name: @platform/adapters-graphql
description: GraphQL adapter package that binds generated contract documents to approved runtime transport and cache policy.

readme.summary: GraphQL adapter package that binds generated contract documents to approved runtime transport and cache policy.
responsibilities: Own GraphQL runtime fetcher and client binding
Integrate generated TypedDocumentNode operations with TanStack Query or Apollo Client
Handle transport errors, auth headers, cache policy, and retry boundaries
Coordinate GraphQL runtime access to PostgreSQL transactional adapters and ClickHouse analytical adapters without leaking storage details to React packages
nonResponsibilities: Does not define GraphQL schema contracts
Does not own feature workflow composition
Does not contain product-specific domain policy logic
usage: Imported by app or feature edge packages where runtime GraphQL transport is allowed
Consume generated contract documents from the contract package
operationalNotes: Adapter package proves transport ownership remains separate from schema and operation ownership
